plan_section: Step 2: Generate local typed artifacts and provenance from upstream source files

plan_alignment.notes: Implements the Step 2 generator, deterministic stale check, generated local artifacts, stable exports, and manifest/provenance migration to submodule-backed upstream refs.

correctness_safety.notes: Generator validates selected JSON shapes, records the pinned upstream commit, compares generated outputs in check mode without rewriting, and no runtime source imports from vendor paths were found.

code_quality.notes: Implementation is straightforward, uses Node built-ins as specified by the step plan, and keeps generated data isolated behind a typed local export boundary.

completeness.notes: Acceptance criteria are satisfied: commands are present, generated artifacts/provenance are committed, legacy utility fixtures were removed by move, parity tests use generated data, and reported verification covers check/generate/unit/typecheck/lint.

patterns.notes: Follows the planned architecture: vendor remains read-only source material, local generated files are the import boundary, and manifest upstream refs now point to vendor paths while local refs point to generated artifacts.

integration.notes: Imports/exports integrate cleanly with existing Vitest and TypeScript JSON module usage; manifest shape remains compatible with the existing report builder.

flags.note: Serial step validation is intentionally narrower than the generated schema, accepting only explicit send/wait step types; if upstream later emits schema-valid command or omitted send types, the stale check will fail and require a conscious adapter update.
